SELECT 
  "treatment",
  MAX(-"G") AS max_dissolution_rate,
  (ARRAY_AGG("OmegaAragonite" ORDER BY -"G" DESC))[1] AS OmegaAragonite_at_max
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH unsealed_rates AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
),
peak_rates AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    MAX(dissolution_rate) AS max_dissolution_rate
  FROM unsealed_rates
  GROUP BY species
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT max_dissolution_rate FROM peak_rates WHERE species = 'trossulus') / 
  NULLIF((SELECT max_dissolution_rate FROM peak_rates WHERE species = 'californianus'), 0) AS factor

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  COUNT(*) AS n_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  STDDEV(-"G") AS sd_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH species_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.trossulus.painted') THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.californianus', 'shell.californianus.painted') THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus') THEN 'unsealed'
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus.painted', 'shell.californianus.painted') THEN 'sealed'
    END AS seal_status,
    -"G" AS neg_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
)
SELECT 
  species,
  AVG(neg_G) FILTER (WHERE seal_status = 'unsealed') - AVG(neg_G) FILTER (WHERE seal_status = 'sealed') AS mean_difference
FROM species_dissolution
GROUP BY species
ORDER BY species

SELECT 
  (SELECT AVG("shell.wt") 
   FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" 
   WHERE "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%') / 
  (SELECT AVG("shell.wt") 
   FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" 
   WHERE "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%') AS weight_ratio

WITH treatment_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    regr_slope("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS slope,
    corr("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS pearson_correlation
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL AND "OmegaAragonite" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)
SELECT 
  "treatment",
  slope,
  pearson_correlation
FROM treatment_stats
ORDER BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
  END AS species,
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
    ELSE 'unsealed'
  END AS sealing,
  COUNT("shell.number") AS n_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY species, sealing
ORDER BY species, sealing

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  AVG("shell.wt") AS mean_shell_wt,
  STDDEV("shell.wt") AS stddev_shell_wt,
  COUNT("shell.wt") AS n
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "shell.wt" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH treatment_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(-"G") AS mean_neg_g,
    STDDEV_SAMP(-"G") AS sd_neg_g
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)
SELECT 
  "treatment",
  ROUND(mean_neg_g::numeric, 4) AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  ROUND((1.96 * sd_neg_g / SQRT(n))::numeric, 4) AS ci_half_width
FROM treatment_stats
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH unsealed_data AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    -"G" AS neg_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    AVG(neg_G) AS mean_neg_G,
    STDDEV_SAMP(neg_G) AS sd_neg_G,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM unsealed_data
  GROUP BY species
),
pooled AS (
  SELECT 
    SQRT(
      (SUM((n - 1) * POWER(sd_neg_G, 2))) / (SUM(n) - 2)
    ) AS pooled_sd
  FROM stats
)
SELECT 
  (t.mean_neg_G - c.mean_neg_G) / p.pooled_sd AS cohens_d
FROM stats t
CROSS JOIN stats c
CROSS JOIN pooled p
WHERE t.species = 'trossulus' 
  AND c.species = 'californianus'

WITH unsealed_data AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    -"G" AS neg_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    AVG(neg_G) AS mean_val,
    VAR_SAMP(neg_G) AS var_val,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM unsealed_data
  GROUP BY species
),
trossulus AS (
  SELECT mean_val AS m1, var_val AS v1, n AS n1
  FROM stats WHERE species = 'trossulus'
),
californianus AS (
  SELECT mean_val AS m2, var_val AS v2, n AS n2
  FROM stats WHERE species = 'californianus'
)
SELECT 
  (t.m1 - c.m2) / SQRT((t.v1 / t.n1) + (c.v2 / c.n2)) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM trossulus t, californianus c

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'unsealed'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted' THEN 'sealed'
    END AS shell_type,
    -"G" AS neg_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.trossulus.painted')
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    shell_type,
    AVG(neg_G) AS mean_neg_G,
    STDDEV_SAMP(neg_G) AS sd_neg_G,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM filtered_data
  GROUP BY shell_type
),
pooled_sd AS (
  SELECT 
    SQRT(
      (SUM((n - 1) * POWER(sd_neg_G, 2))) / (SUM(n) - 2)
    ) AS pooled_stddev
  FROM group_stats
)
SELECT 
  (MAX(CASE WHEN shell_type = 'unsealed' THEN mean_neg_G END) - 
   MAX(CASE WHEN shell_type = 'sealed' THEN mean_neg_G END)) / pooled_stddev AS cohens_d
FROM group_stats
CROSS JOIN pooled_sd

WITH unsealed AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS neg_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
sealed AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS neg_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus.painted'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(neg_G) FROM unsealed) AS mean_unsealed,
    (SELECT AVG(neg_G) FROM sealed) AS mean_sealed,
    (SELECT VAR_SAMP(neg_G) FROM unsealed) AS var_unsealed,
    (SELECT VAR_SAMP(neg_G) FROM sealed) AS var_sealed,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unsealed) AS n_unsealed,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sealed) AS n_sealed
)
SELECT 
  (mean_unsealed - mean_sealed) / SQRT((var_unsealed / n_unsealed) + (var_sealed / n_sealed)) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM stats

WITH treatment_stats AS (

    "treatment",

SELECT 
  (avg(power(((-"G" - avg(-"G") OVER ()) / stddev_pop(-"G") OVER ()), 3))) AS skewness
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL

SELECT count(*) AS n_shells
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
  AND "G" > (
    SELECT max("G")
    FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
    WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
  )

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" AS neg_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
grand AS (
  SELECT 
    avg(neg_G) AS grand_mean,
    count(*) AS n_total,
    count(DISTINCT "treatment") AS k
  FROM filtered
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    avg(neg_G) AS group_mean,
    count(*) AS n_group
  FROM filtered
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
ss_between AS (
  SELECT 
    sum(g.n_group * power(g.group_mean - gr.grand_mean, 2)) AS ssb
  FROM group_stats g
  CROSS JOIN grand gr
),
ss_within AS (
  SELECT 
    sum(power(f.neg_G - g.group_mean, 2)) AS ssw
  FROM filtered f
  JOIN group_stats g ON f."treatment" = g."treatment"
)
SELECT 
  gr.k - 1 AS df_between,
  gr.n_total - gr.k AS df_within,
  (ssb.ssb / (gr.k - 1)) / (ssw.ssw / (gr.n_total - gr.k)) AS f_statistic
FROM grand gr
CROSS JOIN ss_between ssb
CROSS JOIN ss_within ssw

WITH prepared AS (
  SELECT 
    LN(-"G") AS ln_neg_g,
    "OmegaAragonite",
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS sealed,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS species_calif
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL 
    AND "OmegaAragonite" IS NOT NULL
),
means AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(ln_neg_g) AS mean_y,
    AVG("OmegaAragonite") AS mean_x1,
    AVG(sealed) AS mean_x2,
    AVG(species_calif) AS mean_x3,
    AVG(sealed * species_calif) AS mean_x4,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM prepared
),
centered AS (
  SELECT 
    p.ln_neg_g - m.mean_y AS y,
    p."OmegaAragonite" - m.mean_x1 AS x1,
    p.sealed - m.mean_x2 AS x2,
    p.species_calif - m.mean_x3 AS x3,
    (p.sealed * p.species_calif) - m.mean_x4 AS x4,
    m.n
  FROM prepared p CROSS JOIN means m
),
sums AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(x1*x1) AS s11, SUM(x1*x2) AS s12, SUM(x1*x3) AS s13, SUM(x1*x4) AS s14,
    SUM(x2*x2) AS s22, SUM(x2*x3) AS s23, SUM(x2*x4) AS s24,
    SUM(x3*x3) AS s33, SUM(x3*x4) AS s34,
    SUM(x4*x4) AS s44,
    SUM(x1*y) AS sy1, SUM(x2*y) AS sy2, SUM(x3*y) AS sy3, SUM(x4*y) AS sy4,
    MAX(n) AS n
  FROM centered
),
inv AS (
  SELECT
    ((s22*s33*s44 - s22*s34*s34 - s23*s23*s44 + 2*s23*s24*s34 - s24*s24*s33) / 
     (s11*s22*s33*s44 - s11*s22*s34*s34 - s11*s23*s23*s44 + s11*s23*s24*s34 + s11*s23*s34*s24 - s11*s24*s24*s33 - s12*s12*s33*s44 + s12*s12*s34*s34 + s12*s13*s23*s44 - s12*s13*s24*s34 - s12*s13*s34*s24 + s12*s13*s34*s24 + s12*s14*s23*s34 - s12*s14*s33*s24 - s12*s23*s13*s44 + s12*s23*s14*s34 + s12*s24*s13*s34 - s12*s

WITH model_data AS (
  SELECT 
    ln(-"G") AS log_neg_G,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.californianus%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS species_californianus,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS sealed,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.californianus%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END * 
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS interaction
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0 AND "G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  round(regr_intercept(log_neg_G, species_californianus)::numeric, 4) AS intercept,
  round(regr_slope(log_neg_G, species_californianus)::numeric, 4) AS species_coef,
  round(regr_slope(log_neg_G, sealed)::numeric, 4) AS sealing_coef,
  round(regr_slope(log_neg_G, interaction)::numeric, 4) AS interaction_coef
FROM model_data

SELECT

  "Site",
  AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival,
  COUNT(*) AS num_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"

GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IN ('black pea', 'green pea')
    AND "Survival" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
sites_with_both AS (
  SELECT "Site"
  FROM site_crop_survival
  GROUP BY "Site"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") = 2
),
comparison AS (
  SELECT 
    swb."Site",
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'black pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) AS black_pea_survival,
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'green pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) AS green_pea_survival
  FROM sites_with_both swb
  JOIN site_crop_survival scs ON swb."Site" = scs."Site"
  GROUP BY swb."Site"
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_sites,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE black_pea_survival > green_pea_survival) AS sites_black_exceeds_green
FROM comparison

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Site" IN ('Kiamo', 'Kibber', 'Tashigang')
    AND "Crop" IN ('barley', 'green pea')
    AND "Survival" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'barley' THEN mean_survival END) AS barley_survival,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'green pea' THEN mean_survival END) AS green_pea_survival
  FROM site_crop_survival
  GROUP BY "Site"
)
SELECT 
  "Site",
  barley_survival,
  green_pea_survival
FROM pivoted
WHERE barley_survival > green_pea_survival

SELECT 
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate,
    COUNT(*) AS n_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' 
  AND "Site" = 'Kiamo'

SELECT 
  "Crop",
  COUNT(*) AS n_plots,
  ROUND(AVG("Survival")::numeric, 4) AS mean_survival,
  ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP("Survival")::numeric, 4) AS sd_survival
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Survival" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Crop"
ORDER BY "Crop"

SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate,
    COUNT(*) AS number_of_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
ORDER BY "Site", "Crop"

SELECT 
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_140") AS percentile_25,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_140") AS percentile_50,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_140") AS percentile_75,
    COUNT(*) AS n_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Average_height_140" IS NOT NULL

WITH plot_max_height AS (
  SELECT 
    GREATEST(
      "Average_height_50",
      "Average_height_60",
      "Average_height_70",
      "Average_height_80",
      "Average_height_90",
      "Average_height_100",
      "Average_height_110",
      "Average_height_120",
      "Average_height_130",
      "Average_height_140"
    ) AS max_height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
),
binned AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN max_height <= 24 THEN '0-24'
      WHEN max_height <= 48 THEN '24-48'
      WHEN max_height <= 72 THEN '48-72'
      WHEN max_height <= 96 THEN '72-96'
      WHEN max_height <= 120 THEN '96-120'
      ELSE '>120'
    END AS height_bin
  FROM plot_max_height
  WHERE max_height IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT height_bin, COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM binned
GROUP BY height_bin
ORDER BY 
  CASE height_bin
    WHEN '0-24' THEN 1
    WHEN '24-48' THEN 2
    WHEN '48-72' THEN 3
    WHEN '72-96' THEN 4
    WHEN '96-120' THEN 5
    WHEN '>120' THEN 6
  END

SELECT "Type" AS most_common_type, 
       COUNT(*) AS accession_count
FROM "peapca_supplement_genome"
WHERE "Type" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Type"
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH plot_means AS (
  SELECT 
    ("Average_height_50" + "Average_height_60" + "Average_height_70" + "Average_height_80" + 
     "Average_height_90" + "Average_height_100" + "Average_height_110" + "Average_height_120" + 
     "Average_height_130" + "Average_height_140") / 10.0 AS mean_height,
    ("Average_leaves_40" + "Average_leaves_50" + "Average_leaves_60" + "Average_leaves_70" + 
     "Average_leaves_80" + "Average_leaves_90" + "Average_leaves_100" + "Average_leaves_110" + 
     "Average_leaves_120") / 9.0 AS mean_leaves
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
    AND "Average_height_50" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_60" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_70" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_80" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_90" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_110" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_120" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_130" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_140" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_40" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_50" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_60" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_70" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_80" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_90" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_100" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_110" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_120" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  CORR(mean_height, mean_leaves) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS n_plots
FROM plot_means

WITH black_pea_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG("Average_height_120") AS overall_mean,
    STDDEV_SAMP("Average_height_120") AS overall_stddev
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
    AND "Average_height_120" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  c."Site",
  c."Average_height_120" AS mean_height,
  ROUND(
    (("Average_height_120" - s.overall_mean) / NULLIF(s.overall_stddev, 0))::numeric,
    3
  ) AS z_score
FROM "2023_crop_data" c
CROSS JOIN black_pea_stats s
WHERE c."Crop" = 'black pea'
  AND c."Average_height_120" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c."Site", c."Average_height_120"

WITH matrix_values AS (
  SELECT 
    row_number() OVER () AS row_num,
    col_1, col_2, col_3, col_4, col_5, col_6, col_7, col_8, col_9,
    col_10, col_11, col_12, col_13, col_14, col_15, col_16, col_17, col_18
  FROM "Pea_n18_NC_066583"
),
unpivoted AS (
  SELECT row_num, 1 AS col_num, col_1 AS value FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 2, col_2 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 3, col_3 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 4, col_4 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 5, col_5 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 6, col_6 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 7, col_7 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 8, col_8 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 9, col_9 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 10, col_10 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 11, col_11 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 12, col_12 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 13, col_13 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 14, col_14 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 15, col_15 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 16, col_16 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 17, col_17 FROM matrix_values
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 18, col_18 FROM matrix_values
),
asymmetry AS (
  SELECT 
    a.row_num,
    a.col_num,
    abs(a.value - b.value) AS asymmetry_value
  FROM unpivoted a
  JOIN unpivoted b ON a.row_num = b.col_num AND a.col_num = b.row_num
  WHERE a.row_num < a.col_num
)
SELECT max(asymmetry_value) AS max_asymmetry
FROM asymmetry

WITH infected_from_outcomes AS (
  SELECT "Subject.ID"
  FROM "outcomes_public"
  WHERE "ever_infected" = 1
),
infected_from_inf AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "SUBJECT.ID."
  FROM "inf_public"
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT o."Subject.ID") AS ever_infected_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT i."SUBJECT.ID.") AS in_infection_table_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o."Subject.ID") - COUNT(DISTINCT i."SUBJECT.ID.") AS missing_from_infection_table
FROM infected_from_outcomes o
LEFT JOIN infected_from_inf i ON o."Subject.ID" = i."SUBJECT.ID."

WITH breakthrough_patients AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT o."Subject.ID", o."IDorHV"
  FROM "outcomes_public" o
  WHERE o."breakthru" = 1
),
infection_symptoms AS (
  SELECT 
    bp."IDorHV",
    COUNT(DISTINCT i."SUBJECT.ID.") AS n_surveyed,
    SUM(CASE WHEN i."fatigue" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fatigue_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN i."cough" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cough_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN i."nausea_vomiting" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nausea_count
  FROM breakthrough_patients bp
  INNER JOIN "inf_public" i ON bp."Subject.ID" = i."SUBJECT.ID."
  WHERE i."infection_timing" = 'Breakthrough'
  GROUP BY bp."IDorHV"
)
SELECT 
  "IDorHV",
  n_surveyed,
  ROUND((fatigue_count::numeric / n_surveyed * 100), 2) AS fatigue_share_pct,
  ROUND((cough_count::numeric / n_surveyed * 100), 2) AS cough_share_pct,
  ROUND((nausea_count::numeric / n_surveyed * 100), 2) AS nausea_share_pct
FROM infection_symptoms
ORDER BY "IDorHV"

WITH scored AS (
  SELECT 
    b."id",
    e."IDorHV",
    CASE 
      WHEN b."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Very false for me' THEN 1
      WHEN b."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Somewhat false for me' THEN 2
      WHEN b."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Slightly false for me' THEN 3
      WHEN b."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Slightly true for me' THEN 4
      WHEN b."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Somewhat true for me' THEN 5
      WHEN b."after.behaviors.returned" = 'Very true for me' THEN 6
    END AS score
  FROM "behavior_raw_public" b
  JOIN "new_elisa_public" e ON b."id" = e."Subject.ID"
  WHERE b."after.behaviors.returned" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "IDorHV",
  ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric, 2) AS mean_score,
  COUNT(DISTINCT "id") AS n_respondents
FROM scored
WHERE score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "IDorHV"
ORDER BY "IDorHV"

WITH participant_pre_infection AS (

    o."reinfected",

  WHERE e."COVID_pos_before_sample" = 0
    AND e."conc.ug_ml" IS NOT NULL

),
per_participant_median AS (

    "Subject.ID",
    "reinfected",
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS median_conc

  GROUP BY "Subject.ID", "reinfected"
)
SELECT 
  "reinfected",
  percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY median_conc) AS median_per_participant_pre_infection_igg,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM per_participant_median
GROUP BY "reinfected"
ORDER BY "reinfected"

WITH dose_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    "Subject.ID",
    "IDorHV",
    (CASE WHEN "vaccine_1_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN "vaccine_2_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN "vaccine_3_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN "vaccine_4_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN "vaccine_5_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN "vaccine_6_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_doses
  FROM "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE "IDorHV" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Subject.ID", "IDorHV"
)
SELECT 
  "IDorHV",
  ROUND(AVG(total_doses)::numeric, 2) AS mean_doses,
  ROUND(STDDEV(total_doses)::numeric, 2) AS sd_doses
FROM dose_counts
GROUP BY "IDorHV"

WITH dose3_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "conc.ug_ml",
    "breakthru"
  FROM "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE "time" = 'post-dose 3'
    AND "COVID_pos_before_sample" = 0
    AND "conc.ug_ml" IS NOT NULL
    AND "breakthru" IS NOT NULL
),
stats_by_group AS (
  SELECT 
    "breakthru",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG("conc.ug_ml") AS mean_conc,
    VAR_SAMP("conc.ug_ml") AS var_conc
  FROM dose3_data
  GROUP BY "breakthru"
)
SELECT 
  (MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 1 THEN mean_conc END) - MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 0 THEN mean_conc END)) / 
  SQRT(
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 1 THEN var_conc / n END) + 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 0 THEN var_conc / n END)
  ) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM stats_by_group

WITH breakthrough_fatigue AS (
  SELECT 
    i."new_group",
    i."fatigue"
  FROM "inf_public" i
  WHERE i."infection_timing" = 'Breakthrough'
    AND i."fatigue" IS NOT NULL
),
contingency AS (
  SELECT 
    "new_group",
    SUM(CASE WHEN "fatigue" = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fatigue_yes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "fatigue" = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fatigue_no,
    COUNT(*) AS group_total
  FROM breakthrough_fatigue
  GROUP BY "new_group"
),
totals AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(fatigue_yes) AS total_yes,
    SUM(fatigue_no) AS total_no,
    SUM(group_total) AS grand_total
  FROM contingency
),
expected_and_chi AS (
  SELECT 
    c."new_group",
    c.fatigue_yes AS observed_yes,
    c.fatigue_no AS observed_no,
    (c.group_total::double precision * t.total_yes::double precision / t.grand_total::double precision) AS expected_yes,
    (c.group_total::double precision * t.total_no::double precision / t.grand_total::double precision) AS expected_no
  FROM contingency c
  CROSS JOIN totals t
)
SELECT 
  SUM(
    POWER(observed_yes - expected_yes, 2) / expected_yes +
    POWER(observed_no - expected_no, 2) / expected_no
  ) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM expected_and_chi

SELECT

  percentile_cont(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS q1,
  percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS median,
  percentile_cont(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS q3
FROM "new_elisa_public"

WITH study_weeks AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "Collection.date"
  FROM "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE "Collection.date" IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY "Collection.date"
  LIMIT 25
),
week_saturdays AS (
  SELECT 
    "Collection.date",
    (DATE_TRUNC('week', "Collection.date"::date) + INTERVAL '6 days')::date AS week_ending
  FROM study_weeks
),
variant_shares AS (
  SELECT 
    ws."Collection.date",
    v."week_ending",
    v."variant",
    v."share"
  FROM week_saturdays ws
  JOIN "SARS_CoV_2_Variant_Proportions_2023_09_28" v
    ON v."week_ending"::date = ws.week_ending
  WHERE v."usa_or_hhsregion" = 'USA'
    AND v."modeltype" = 'weighted'
),
max_shares AS (
  SELECT 
    "Collection.date",
    "week_ending",
    MAX("share") AS max_share
  FROM variant_shares
  GROUP BY "Collection.date", "week_ending"
)
SELECT 
  vs."Collection.date",
  vs."week_ending",
  vs."variant",
  vs."share"
FROM variant_shares vs
JOIN max_shares ms
  ON vs."Collection.date" = ms."Collection.date"
  AND vs."week_ending" = ms."week_ending"
  AND vs."share" = ms.max_share
ORDER BY vs."Collection.date"

WITH peak_titers AS (
  SELECT 
    "Subject.ID",
    MAX("conc.ug_ml") AS peak_igg,
    MAX("new_group") AS new_group,
    MAX("breakthru") AS breakthru
  FROM "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE "conc.ug_ml" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Subject.ID"
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "Subject.ID",
    peak_igg,
    new_group,
    breakthru,
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY peak_igg) AS quartile,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY peak_igg) AS percentile_rank,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY peak_igg DESC) AS rn
  FROM peak_titers
)
SELECT 
  "Subject.ID",
  peak_igg,
  new_group,
  breakthru,
  quartile,
  ROUND(percentile_rank::numeric, 4) AS percentile_rank
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 15
ORDER BY peak_igg DESC

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    "total",
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "total") AS rank
  FROM "raw_group_size"
  WHERE "total" IS NOT NULL AND "population" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    SUM(rank) AS sum_ranks
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "population"
),
overall_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_n
  FROM ranked_data
)
SELECT 
  (12.0 / (total_n * (total_n + 1))) * 
  SUM(sum_ranks * sum_ranks / n) - 
  3 * (total_n + 1) AS kruskal_wallis_chi_square
FROM group_stats
CROSS JOIN overall_stats

WITH male_male_lata AS (
  SELECT 
    "num_agon",
    "video_duration"
  FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
  WHERE "species" = 'P. lata'
    AND "sex" = 'Male'
    AND "video_duration" > 0
),
agon_rates AS (
  SELECT 
    ("num_agon" / "video_duration") * 3600 AS agon_per_hour
  FROM male_male_lata
)
SELECT 
  avg(agon_per_hour) AS mean_agon_rate_per_hour,
  avg(agon_per_hour) - 1.96 * stddev_samp(agon_per_hour) / sqrt(count(*)) AS ci_lower,
  avg(agon_per_hour) + 1.96 * stddev_samp(agon_per_hour) / sqrt(count(*)) AS ci_upper
FROM agon_rates

WITH body_length_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "species",
    AVG("size") AS mean_body_length
  FROM "raw_body_length"
  GROUP BY "species"
),
group_size_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "species",
    AVG("total") AS mean_aggregation_size
  FROM "raw_group_size"
  GROUP BY "species"
),
agonism_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "species",
    AVG(("num_agon" / "video_duration") * 3600) AS mean_male_male_agonism_rate_per_hour
  FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
  WHERE "sex" = 'Male'
  GROUP BY "species"
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(bl."species", gs."species", ag."species") AS species,
  bl.mean_body_length,
  gs.mean_aggregation_size,
  ag.mean_male_male_agonism_rate_per_hour
FROM body_length_stats bl
FULL OUTER JOIN group_size_stats gs ON bl."species" = gs."species"
FULL OUTER JOIN agonism_stats ag ON COALESCE(bl."species", gs."species") = ag."species"
ORDER BY species

SELECT

SELECT "subgroup", COUNT(*) AS individual_count

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_loci

WITH species_in_group_size AS (

),
species_in_body_length AS (

),
species_in_behaviour AS (

),
all_species AS (

  SELECT "species" FROM species_in_body_length

SELECT

  CASE WHEN b."species" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS in_body_length,

  CASE WHEN g."species" IS NOT NULL AND b."species" IS NOT NULL AND bh."species" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS in_all_three

LEFT JOIN species_in_group_size g ON a."species" = g."species"

SELECT "stim" AS stimulus_type,
       PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lat_mov") AS median_movement_latency,
       COUNT(*) AS n_trials
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
GROUP BY "stim"
ORDER BY "stim"

SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lat_mov") AS median_movement_latency
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
WHERE "stim" = 'visual'

WITH response_rates AS (

    "stimulus",
    COUNT(*) AS n_trials,
    AVG("call01") AS acoustic_response_rate,

  FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
  GROUP BY "stimulus"
)
SELECT 
  "stimulus",

SELECT

SELECT 
  "stimulus",
  regr_slope("vsig01", "noise_raw") AS slope,
  corr("vsig01", "noise_raw") AS pearson_correlation

GROUP BY "stimulus"

WITH contingency AS (
  SELECT 
    "stimulus",
    "call01",
    COUNT(*) AS observed
  FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
  WHERE "stimulus" IS NOT NULL AND "call01" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "stimulus", "call01"
),
marginals AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(observed) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "call01" = 1 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) AS call_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "call01" = 0 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) AS no_call_total
  FROM contingency
),
stimulus_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "stimulus",
    SUM(observed) AS stimulus_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "stimulus"
),
expected_calc AS (
  SELECT 
    c."stimulus",
    c."call01",
    c.observed,
    (st.stimulus_total::numeric * 
     CASE WHEN c."call01" = 1 THEN m.call_total ELSE m.no_call_total END::numeric / 
     m.total::numeric) AS expected
  FROM contingency c
  CROSS JOIN marginals m
  JOIN stimulus_totals st ON c."stimulus" = st."stimulus"
)
SELECT 
  SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM expected_calc

SELECT 
  "ind",
  "condition",
  "lat_mov",
  PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "condition") AS condition_percentile_rank,
  AVG("lat_mov") OVER (ORDER BY "condition" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_lat_mov
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
WHERE "stim" = 'multimodal' 
  AND "mov_status" = 2
ORDER BY "condition"

SELECT 'env_0_1_fixed' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "env_0_1_fixed"

SELECT 'lat_surv_females_fixed' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"

SELECT

  "call_status",

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (e."call01" = 1 AND l."call_status" = 1) OR (e."call01" = 0 AND l."call_status" = 2)) AS acoustic_disagreements,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (e."vsig01" = 1 AND l."vs_status" = 1) OR (e."vsig01" = 0 AND l."vs_status" = 2)) AS visual_disagreements
FROM "env_0_1_fixed" e

SELECT

JOIN "lat_surv_females_fixed" l

WHERE (e."vsig01" = 1 AND l."vs_status" = 1)
   OR (e."vsig01" = 0 AND l."vs_status" = 2)

SELECT "stimulus", COUNT(*) AS trial_count
FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
GROUP BY "stimulus"
ORDER BY "stimulus"

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)", "ID") AS rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental' 
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT
    "sex",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
totals AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(n) AS total_n,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN n END) AS n1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN n END) AS n2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN rank_sum END) AS r1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN rank_sum END) AS r2
  FROM group_stats
)
SELECT
  n1 AS male_n,
  n2 AS female_n,
  (r1 - n1 * (n1 + n2 + 1.0) / 2.0) / SQRT(n1 * n2 * (n1 + n2 + 1.0) / 12.0) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM totals

WITH adults_used AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
),
male_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS n_male,
    AVG(rank) AS mean_rank_male
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      "Perch height (cm)",
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)", "sex") AS rank
    FROM adults_used
  ) ranked
  WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IN (SELECT "Perch height (cm)" FROM adults_used WHERE "sex" = 'male')
),
female_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS n_female
  FROM adults_used
  WHERE "sex" = 'female'
),
all_ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS rank
  FROM adults_used
),
male_rank_sum AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(rank) AS R_male
  FROM all_ranked
  WHERE "sex" = 'male'
),
counts AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS n_male,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS n_female
  FROM adults_used
)
SELECT 
  c.n_male,
  c.n_female,
  (m.R_male - c.n_male * (c.n_male + 1.0) / 2.0 - c.n_male * c.n_female / 2.0) / 
    SQRT(c.n_male * c.n_female * (c.n_male + c.n_female + 1.0) / 12.0) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM male_rank_sum m
CROSS JOIN counts c

WITH observed AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Vegetation density",
    COUNT(*) AS obs_count
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "Vegetation density" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "sex", "Vegetation density"
),
marginals AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(obs_count) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN obs_count ELSE 0 END) AS male_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN obs_count ELSE 0 END) AS female_total
  FROM observed
),
density_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "Vegetation density",
    SUM(obs_count) AS density_total
  FROM observed
  GROUP BY "Vegetation density"
),
expected AS (
  SELECT 
    o."sex",
    o."Vegetation density",
    o.obs_count,
    (CASE WHEN o."sex" = 'male' THEN m.male_total ELSE m.female_total END * dt.density_total)::numeric / m.total AS exp_count
  FROM observed o
  CROSS JOIN marginals m
  JOIN density_totals dt ON o."Vegetation density" = dt."Vegetation density"
)
SELECT 
  ROUND(SUM(POWER(obs_count - exp_count, 2) / exp_count)::numeric, 4) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM expected

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT "sex", "Vegetation type"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult'
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "sex" IN ('female', 'male')
    AND "Vegetation type" IS NOT NULL
),
contingency AS (
  SELECT "Vegetation type",
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS female_count,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS male_count,
         COUNT(*) AS veg_total
  FROM filtered_data
  GROUP BY "Vegetation type"
),
totals AS (
  SELECT SUM(female_count) AS total_female,
         SUM(male_count) AS total_male,
         SUM(veg_total) AS grand_total
  FROM contingency
),
expected_and_chisq AS (
  SELECT c."Vegetation type",
         c.female_count AS observed_female,
         c.male_count AS observed_male,
         (c.veg_total::numeric * t.total_female / t.grand_total) AS expected_female,
         (c.veg_total::numeric * t.total_male / t.grand_total) AS expected_male
  FROM contingency c
  CROSS JOIN totals t
)
SELECT SUM(
  POWER(observed_female - expected_female, 2) / NULLIF(expected_female, 0) +
  POWER(observed_male - expected_male, 2) / NULLIF(expected_male, 0)
) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM expected_and_chisq

WITH used_plots AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    "Distance from nearest water (m)" AS distance
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental' 
    AND "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NOT NULL
    AND "age" IS NOT NULL
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    distance,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY distance) AS rank
  FROM used_plots
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked
  GROUP BY "age"
),
adult_stats AS (
  SELECT n, rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "age" = 'adult'
),
subadult_stats AS (
  SELECT n, rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "age" = 'subadult'
)
SELECT 
  a.n AS adult_n,
  s.n AS subadult_n,
  (a.rank_sum - a.n * (a.n + s.n + 1.0) / 2.0) / SQRT(a.n * s.n * (a.n + s.n + 1.0) / 12.0) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM adult_stats a, subadult_stats s

SELECT 
  "age",
  percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS median_perch_height_male,
  percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS median_perch_height_female
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
GROUP BY "age"

WITH groups AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    "Tree height (cm)" AS tree_height
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "age" IN ('adult', 'subadult')
    AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    "age",
    count(*) AS n,
    avg(tree_height) AS mean_height,
    stddev_samp(tree_height) AS sd_height,
    variance(tree_height) AS var_height
  FROM groups
  GROUP BY "age"
),
adult_stats AS (
  SELECT n, mean_height, sd_height, var_height
  FROM stats WHERE "age" = 'adult'
),
subadult_stats AS (
  SELECT n, mean_height, sd_height, var_height
  FROM stats WHERE "age" = 'subadult'
)
SELECT
  a.mean_height AS adult_mean,
  s.mean_height AS subadult_mean,
  (a.mean_height - s.mean_height) / 
    sqrt(((a.n - 1) * a.var_height + (s.n - 1) * s.var_height) / (a.n + s.n - 2)) AS cohens_d,
  (a.mean_height - s.mean_height) / 
    sqrt(a.var_height / a.n + s.var_height / s.n) AS welch_t,
  sqrt(a.var_height / a.n + s.var_height / s.n) AS pooled_se,
  a.n AS adult_n,
  s.n AS subadult_n
FROM adult_stats a, subadult_stats s

SELECT 
  "sex",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Light intensity (Lux)") AS median_light_intensity,
  ROUND(AVG("Light intensity (Lux)")::numeric, 2) AS mean_light_intensity,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
  AND "plot" = 'experimental'
  AND "Light intensity (Lux)" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "sex"
ORDER BY "sex"

WITH juvenile_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Rock height (cm)"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult' 
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    "sex",
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Rock height (cm)") AS median_rock_height,
    avg("Rock height (cm)") AS mean_rock_height,
    stddev_samp("Rock height (cm)") AS sd_rock_height,
    count(*) AS n
  FROM juvenile_data
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
pooled_stats AS (
  SELECT
    sqrt(
      (sum((n - 1) * power(sd_rock_height, 2))) / 
      (sum(n) - 2)
    ) AS pooled_sd
  FROM stats
  WHERE "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
)
SELECT
  max(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN median_rock_height END) AS male_median,
  max(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN median_rock_height END) AS female_median,
  (max(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN mean_rock_height END) - 
   max(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN mean_rock_height END)) / 
   max(pooled_sd) AS cohens_d
FROM stats
CROSS JOIN pooled_stats
WHERE "sex" IN ('male', 'female')

WITH counts AS (
  SELECT 
    "Vegetation type",
    SUM(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_count
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "sex" = 'male' 
    AND "age" = 'subadult'
    AND "Vegetation type" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Vegetation type"
)
SELECT 
  "Vegetation type",
  used_count,
  available_count,
  CASE 
    WHEN available_count > 0 THEN used_count::numeric / available_count::numeric
    ELSE NULL
  END AS use_availability_ratio
FROM counts
ORDER BY "Vegetation type"

SELECT 
  "Vegetation density",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') AS used_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control') AS available_count,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control') > 0 
    THEN ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental')::numeric / 
                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control')::numeric), 3)
    ELSE NULL 
  END AS use_availability_ratio
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "sex" = 'male' 
  AND "age" = 'adult'
  AND "Vegetation density" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Vegetation density"
ORDER BY "Vegetation density"

WITH all_plots AS (
  SELECT 
    corr("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS correlation,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS n_pairs
  FROM "Sheet2"
),
used_plots AS (
  SELECT 
    corr("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS correlation,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS n_pairs
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
)
SELECT 
  'all plots' AS plot_type,
  a.correlation,
  a.n_pairs
FROM all_plots a

SELECT

  u.correlation,
  u.n_pairs

SELECT
  regr_slope("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS slope,
  regr_intercept("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS intercept,
  regr_r2("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS r_squared,
  corr("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS pearson_correlation
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL

WITH plot_stats AS (
  SELECT "plot",
         AVG("Tree height (cm)") AS mean_height,
         VAR_SAMP("Tree height (cm)") AS var_height,
         COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "plot"
)
SELECT 
  ROUND(MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental')::numeric, 2) AS mean_tree_height_experimental,
  ROUND(MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control')::numeric, 2) AS mean_tree_height_control,
  ROUND(((MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') - 
          MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control')) /
         SQRT(SUM((n - 1) * var_height) / (SUM(n) - 2)))::numeric, 3) AS cohens_d
FROM plot_stats

SELECT 
  (SUM(POWER("Perch height (cm)" - avg_val, 3)) / COUNT(*)) / POWER(STDDEV_SAMP("Perch height (cm)"), 3) AS skewness,
  (SUM(POWER("Perch height (cm)" - avg_val, 4)) / COUNT(*)) / POWER(STDDEV_SAMP("Perch height (cm)"), 4) - 3 AS excess_kurtosis
FROM "Sheet2"
CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG("Perch height (cm)") AS avg_val FROM "Sheet2" WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS avg_subq
WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') AS experimental_plots,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'random') AS random_plots
FROM "Sheet2"

WITH individual_counts AS (

SELECT

  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Individual number") FROM "Sheet2" WHERE "Individual number" IS NOT NULL) AS distinct_individuals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Sheet2" WHERE "Individual number" IN (SELECT "Individual number" FROM individual_counts WHERE capture_count > 1)) AS recaptures

SELECT

SELECT

SELECT 'strongyle' AS parasite, 'juvenile' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM "strong_df"

SELECT 'liver fluke' AS parasite, 'juvenile' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM "fluke_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'E. cervi' AS parasite, 'juvenile' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM "ecg_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'strongyle' AS parasite, 'adult' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM "adult_strong_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'liver fluke' AS parasite, 'adult' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM "adult_fluke_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'E. cervi' AS parasite, 'adult' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM "adult_ecg_df"
ORDER BY life_stage, parasite

SELECT "MumCode",
       AVG("lEPG") AS mean_burden,
       COUNT(*) AS sample_size,
       RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG("lEPG") DESC) AS rank
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "MumCode" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "MumCode"
ORDER BY mean_burden DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH all_juvenile_samples AS (
  SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod", "Name"
  FROM "strong_df"
  WHERE "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod", "Name"
  FROM "fluke_df"
  WHERE "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod", "Name"
  FROM "ecg_df"
  WHERE "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL
),
yearly_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Year",
    AVG("Survived.mod") AS survival_rate,
    COUNT(*) AS sample_size
  FROM all_juvenile_samples
  GROUP BY "Year"
)
SELECT 
  "Year",
  survival_rate,
  sample_size,
  AVG(survival_rate) OVER (ORDER BY "Year" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS three_year_moving_avg
FROM yearly_survival
ORDER BY "Year"

SELECT COUNT(*) AS samples_without_fluke_match
FROM "strong_df" s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 
  FROM "fluke_df" f 
  WHERE f."Name" = s."Name" 
    AND f."Year" = s."Year" 
    AND f."Season" = s."Season"
)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_other_season
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "Season" NOT IN ('Autumn', 'Spring', 'Summer')

SELECT 
  "Survived.mod",
  AVG("lEPG") AS mean_strongyle_burden,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Survived.mod"
ORDER BY "Survived.mod"

SELECT 
  MIN("FROH") AS min_inbreeding,
  MAX("FROH") AS max_inbreeding,
  MIN("lEPG") AS min_burden,
  MAX("lEPG") AS max_burden
FROM "adult_strong_df"

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") FILTER (WHERE source IN ('strong_df', 'fluke_df', 'ecg_df')) AS juvenile_deer_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") FILTER (WHERE source IN ('adult_fluke_df', 'adult_ecg_df')) AS adult_fluke_ecg_deer_count
FROM (
  SELECT "Name", 'strong_df' AS source FROM "strong_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Name", 'fluke_df' AS source FROM "fluke_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Name", 'ecg_df' AS source FROM "ecg_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Name", 'adult_fluke_df' AS source FROM "adult_fluke_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Name", 'adult_ecg_df' AS source FROM "adult_ecg_df"
) combined

WITH matched_samples AS (
  SELECT 
    s."Name",
    s."Year",
    s."Season",
    s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG,
    f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG,
    e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  INNER JOIN "fluke_df" f 
    ON s."Name" = f."Name" 
    AND s."Year" = f."Year" 
    AND s."Season" = f."Season"
  INNER JOIN "ecg_df" e 
    ON s."Name" = e."Name" 
    AND s."Year" = e."Year" 
    AND s."Season" = e."Season"
  WHERE s."lEPG" IS NOT NULL 
    AND f."lEPG" IS NOT NULL 
    AND e."lEPG" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  'strong_vs_fluke' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(strong_lEPG, fluke_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_samples
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'strong_vs_ecg' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(strong_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_samples
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'fluke_vs_ecg' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(fluke_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_samples
ORDER BY parasite_pair

SELECT *
FROM "adult_strong_df"
WHERE "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL 
  AND "Survived.mod" NOT IN (0, 1)

SELECT MIN("Year") AS earliest_year,
       MAX("Year") AS latest_year
FROM "fluke_df"

SELECT 
  "AgeCat",
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  CORR("FROH", "lEPG") AS pearson_correlation,
  REGR_SLOPE("lEPG", "FROH") AS regression_slope
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "FROH" IS NOT NULL AND "lEPG" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "AgeCat"
ORDER BY "AgeCat"

SELECT 
  width_bucket("FROH", -2, 9, 5) AS inbreeding_bin,
  count(*) AS record_count
FROM "adult_fluke_df"
GROUP BY width_bucket("FROH", -2, 9, 5)
ORDER BY inbreeding_bin
